footer.tagline: Made with sourdough and lots of love.

hero.title: Natural bread and cookies, no preservatives and with real ingredients.
hero.subtitle: In Dallas, finding quality artisanal bread and desserts made with real ingredients is a challenge… until our Güerita arrived.
hero.description: Our cookies, made with sourdough, have a complexity and depth of flavor that makes them unique. Our rustic breads go through a natural fermentation of over 20 hours.

scarcity.title: Artisanal production in small batches.
scarcity.text: Don't miss out on your sourdough bread and cookies.
scarcity.highlight: If you blink, you'll miss your Sourdough.

events.title: For your events
events.text: Have a special dinner or gathering? We customize our cookie and loaf boxes to give your event the unique artisanal touch of Pásele Güerita.

business.title: For your business
business.label: Wholesale
business.text: Bring the magic of our sourdough to your café or restaurant. We offer wholesale pricing for business partners seeking superior quality.

testimonials.quote: "From Farmersville Texas, we share this little piece of tradition and conscious flavor. For Dallas and surrounding areas."

items.text: The first bread in years that doesn't bloat me. The Matcha cookies are spectacular.
items.author: — Mariana L., Uptown

items.text: Worth every penny. You can taste the love and the 24-hour fermentation. I'm never going back to store-bought bread.
items.author: — Roberto C., Oak Cliff

gallery.caption: From the oven to your heart

contact.title: Write to us
contact.subtitle: At our oven, we believe the best decisions are the ones that nourish the soul.

subscriptions.title: Weekly Subscriptions
subscriptions.text: Ask about our subscriptions: we deliver your sliced bread at no extra cost.

menu.title: Full Menu
menu.heading: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: We bake small batches every week. Pick your favorites and get them fresh in Dallas.
